Off Calendar Mar-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Eric Shiu, Esq., appeared for Defendant & moving party:State of Calif. Board of Trustee
Timothy Kodami, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & opposing party: Amanda Lipow

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Requests For Production is moot. The court will not determine the adequacy of the responses on this motion. Late opposition has been considered. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
